prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 96.8 kg; Height 168.7 cm; BMI 34.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 96.2kg; 9 months ago 95.7kg; 6 months ago 93.7kg; 3 months ago 95.3kg; current 96.8kg), Height (12 months ago 168.7cm; 9 months ago 168.7cm; 6 months ago 168.7cm; 3 months ago 168.7cm; current 168.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 121mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 133U/L; 9 months ago 119U/L; 6 months ago 116U/L; 3 months ago 110U/L; current 124U/L), AST (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 74U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 654mg/g; 9 months ago 519mg/g; 6 months ago 718mg/g; 3 months ago 724mg/g; current 793mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 103mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.1g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
